source.name: New York City event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: It’s My Park at Ewen Park
events.description: This It’s My Park season, volunteer with Stewards of Ewen Park to do a general cleanup, plant, weed, water, spread mulch, and much more at Ewen Park. We look forward to cleaning up the park with you! Volunteers should meet at the toolbox by the dog run. For more information, please email masonjenkins100@yahoo.com.

events.title: Compost In Context (Master Composter Course)
events.description: Learn about composting in the context of NYC — its challenges, changes, and importance. Whether you have decades of composting experience or none at all, everyone is encouraged to join this free 2-hour session. This workshop counts towards the Master Composter certification, but is open to all. Free | RSVP Here .

events.title: It’s My Park at Franz Sigel Park
events.description: This It’s My Park season, volunteer with Friends of 4 Parks Alliance, Inc. to do a general cleanup at Franz Sigel Park. We look forward to cleaning up the park with you! Volunteers should meet at meet at dog run by the rotunda. Bags will be left there for pickup by parks department. For more information, please email friendsof4parks@fruends.org.

events.title: It’s My Park at Jackie Robinson Park
events.description: This It’s My Park season, volunteer with Harlem Congregations for Community Improvement (HCCI) to plant some amazingly colorful flowers at Jackie Robinson Park. We look forward to cleaning up the park with you! Volunteers should meet at Jackie Robinson Park at 153rd St & Bradhurst Ave. For more information, please email hlaguda@hcci.org.

events.title: It’s My Park at McKinley Park
events.description: This It’s My Park season, volunteer with Parent-Child Relationship Association to beautify McKinley Park. We look forward to cleaning up the park with you!
